items.content_html: A dark, elegant theme that unifies your digital workspace across code editors, Windows Terminal, Windows 11, and more. Violet Void features a rich violet palette, subtle glowing effects, custom icons, live wallpapers, and a tailored GlazeWM window manager to enhance focus and reduce eye strain.
items.title: aaronedev/violet-void-theme: A dark, elegant theme that unifies your digital workspace across code editors, Windows Terminal, Windows 11, and more. Violet Void features a rich violet palette, subtle glowing effects, custom icons, live wallpapers, and a tailored GlazeWM window manager to enhance focus and reduce eye strain.

items.content_html: An AutoHotkey script that records left, right, and middle mouse clicks, logging the date, time, and x and y coordinates. It features automatic GUI updates and generates a visual heatmap via a Python script, accessible from the system tray. This tool is ideal for analyzing user interaction and creating detailed mouse activity maps.
items.title: RobThePCGuy/AHK-Mouse-Heatmap: An AutoHotkey script that records left, right, and middle mouse clicks, logging the date, time, and x and y coordinates. It features automatic GUI updates and generates a visual heatmap via a Python script, accessible from the system tray. This tool is ideal for analyzing user interaction and creating detailed mouse activity maps.

items.content_html: This tool requires AutoHotKey Dash. It simplifies creating macro key command scripts visually, eliminating manual script creation. Generate multiple key commands for any auto tools. For instance, convert scripts into .exe files for Huion Tablet buttons, streamlining creative art projects.
items.title: Toaster100/AutoHotKey-Macros-Generator-Tool: This tool requires AutoHotKey Dash. It simplifies creating macro key command scripts visually, eliminating manual script creation. Generate multiple key commands for any auto tools. For instance, convert scripts into .exe files for Huion Tablet buttons, streamlining creative art projects.
